issue_summary: This is a controlled outage-card test to validate channel routing, template quality, and lane-specific formatting.
why_you_care: You want to know the outage lane is visually sharp and functionally ready before a real vendor incident lands there.
impact: No live impact. Delivery and readability verification only.
response_1: No action needed beyond confirming the card looks right in the lane.
response_2: If the format feels too heavy or too soft, adjust the template before the next real incident.
